events.content:
Purpose: Real-world E2E test for PR #511 features: auto step owner assignment,
review gating, and verification markers. Uses REAL CLI agents (claude, codex).
Small scope — 3 agent steps + 1 deterministic — finishes in ~5 minutes.
Approach: 4-step dag workflow — Parsed 4 steps, 3 dependent steps, DAG validated, no cycles
